batch_summary.note: Sep 18, 2025 homicide investigation event: Melissa's friend's husband was arrested for (suspected) homicide of his wife; Melissa's neighborhood was an active crime scene — 'They breached the house / Crime scene unit is on site / The husband has been arrested and being detained' (ROW-14383-14385). Olivia was present: 'I was trying to process everything that my friend may have been murdered and trying to keep Olivia safe' (ROW-14402). Traumatic third-party violence event with Olivia present. Oct 2 follow-up confirms the friend may have been murdered (ROW-14485). Genuine Sev-1 RF-14 signal.

messages.text: Crime scene unit is on site
The husband has been arrested and being detained
Cause I was trying to process everything that my friend may have been murdered and trying to keep Olivia safe and have her actually listen t[o me]...
My backup would be Amelia bout with her mom just dying and all and not knowing if that was murder that's not an option anymore

primary_flags.classification: RF-14 primary Sev-1 — Olivia present during active homicide investigation at Melissa's neighborhood Sep 18, 2025. Crime scene unit on site; neighbor's husband arrested for suspected murder of wife. Melissa confirms Olivia was present and she was attempting to 'keep Olivia safe' during the event. Oct 2 follow-up confirms the victim (Melissa's friend, Amelia's mother) died and circumstances were potentially homicidal. This represents a traumatic third-party violence event to which Olivia was exposed in Melissa's care environment. ARC-RF14-002 Genuine Safety Documentation Signal 9.
primary_flags.addendum_applied: No specific addendum maps to this event type. Classified under RF-14 'unsafe environment' — exposure to active homicide investigation, traumatic violent event, and associated instability.
primary_flags.cross_rf_note: No RF-15 overlap (not a fabricated allegation). Potential RF-11 cross-reference (environmental instability, household/neighborhood safety). Standalone RF-14 primary.
